intro_sentence: Indeed, contemporary cosmological models agree that the key predictor of intrinsic galaxy quenching ought to be black hole mass (see Piotrowska et al., 2022 ; Bluck et al., 2023 ) , which is explained by black hole mass being directly proportional to the feedback energy injected into galaxy haloes (see Bluck et al., 2020a , for an analytical derivation) .
qwen_reason: Claims black hole mass (internal feedback) is the key predictor for quenching, denying the base claim that environment is a distinct/secondary modulator separable from mass-driven processes.
